summary: P1 Feature Testing: Football Stat Mode Selector UI. All UI components are correctly implemented. Backend game creation is failing with 500 error (unrelated to P1 feature).

critical.issue: Returns 500 Internal Server Error - Pydantic validation error for baseball-specific fields (current_inning, inning_half, outs, balls, strikes, bases, inning_scores) being None when creating football games

integration_issues.issue: Cannot create new games due to backend 500 error - navigation to /football/{id}/simple cannot be verified end-to-end

action_items: FIX CRITICAL: Backend Game model needs default values for baseball-specific fields (current_inning=1, inning_half='top', outs=0, balls=0, strikes=0, bases={}, inning_scores={}) to allow football game creation
After backend fix, verify navigation to /football/{id}/simple for Simple mode and /football/{id} for Advanced mode
critical_code_review_comments: NewGame.jsx lines 174-179: Navigation logic correctly routes to /football/{id}/simple for simple mode and /football/{id} for advanced mode
NewGame.jsx lines 61-67: Default stat mode correctly set to 'advanced' for football
NewGame.jsx lines 473-545: Football stat mode selector UI correctly implemented with data-testid attributes
App.js lines 193-194: Routes correctly defined for /football/:id and /football/:id/simple
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 Football Stat Mode Selector UI is correctly implemented. Backend has a critical bug in POST /api/games - Pydantic validation fails for baseball fields when creating football games. Once backend is fixed, verify end-to-end navigation to /football/{id}/simple and /football/{id}.

stat_mode_selector_visible.notes: Football stat mode selector appears when selectedSport === 'football'

advanced_mode_default.notes: Advanced mode is pre-selected by default (border-green-500 class applied)

simple_mode_description.notes: Simple mode shows 'Broadcaster-friendly, minimal input' description

simple_mode_features.notes: Simple mode features list: Quick scoring, Team stats (yards, turnovers), Game clock control, Keyboard shortcuts, Play-by-play log, No scroll layout

advanced_mode_description.notes: Advanced mode shows 'Full play-by-play tracking' description

advanced_mode_features.notes: Advanced mode features list: Full play-by-play, Field position tracking, Down & distance, Drive summaries, Player stats, Keyboard hotkeys

mode_selection_toggle.notes: Clicking Simple/Advanced buttons correctly toggles selection (orange border for Simple, green border for Advanced)

simple_mode_navigation.notes: Cannot verify - backend game creation failing with 500 error. Code review confirms navigation to /football/{id}/simple

advanced_mode_navigation.notes: Cannot verify - backend game creation failing with 500 error. Code review confirms navigation to /football/{id}
